app_summary: A real-time multiplayer React (Vite) and Express/Node.js full-stack application written in TypeScript. It features a sketchy, hand-drawn UI style, uses Socket.io for real-time features, and integrates with the TON blockchain for USDT deposits.
architecture_notes: React/Vite frontend using Tailwind CSS and roughjs. Express/Node.js backend with MongoDB (Mongoose) and JWT authentication. Uses Toncenter API v3 for blockchain interactions.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User registration and login using JWT. Includes admin roles.
features.notes: Looks solid, using bcrypt and JWT.

features.name: User Profile & Balances
features.description: User can view profile, current USDT balance, and see a leaderboard.

features.name: Matchmaking / Games
features.description: Real-time multiplayer games. Creating matches, joining matches, playing.

features.name: TON USDT Deposits
features.description: Integration with TON blockchain to accept USDT deposits using unique memos.
features.notes: Poller worker seems set up to fetch transactions.

features.name: Merchant Order System
features.description: P2P style merchant buy/sell requests with proof images.
features.notes: Admin approval/rejection is wired up in MerchantView.
